svg.title: Mermaid actor link visuals
svg.desc: Demonstrates Mermaid actor links rendered as actor header share icons with a full bottom reference block. From the project root, regenerate this Mermaid transform and SVG with: node sequencer.js --mermaid -i test/mermaid-features/23-actor-link-visuals/input.mmd -o -f -t test/mermaid-features/23-actor-link-visuals
svg.text: Demonstrates Mermaid actor links rendered as actor header share icons with a full bottom reference block.
